calendar.matters:
Notice Of Joinder In Respondent San Francisco Board Of Education'S Motion To Strike And Objections To Petitioners' Evidence; Proof Of Service
Off Calendar Aug-17-2005 Denied
MINI MINUTES: RESPONDENT ARLENE ACKERMAN'S Joinder In Respondent San Francisco Board Of Education'S Motion To Strike And Objections To Petitioners' Evidence.
APPEARANCES: Enrique Pearce, Esq., and G. Whitney Leigh, Esq. of 415-217-3200 of Gonzalez & Leigh, LLP for Petitioner and Moving Party; Robin B. Johansen, Esq. 510-346-6200 of Remcho, Johansen & Purcell for Respondent San Francisco Unified School District and opposing party; Elizabeth C. Pritzker, Esq. 650-697-6000 of Cotchett, Pitre, Simon & McCarthy for Respondent Arlene Ackerman, and opposing party.
RULING: Argued and the Court took the matter under submission. Counsel to submit prospective orders. Argument lasted over an hour and therefore per diem fees of $140.00 have been assessed pursuant to G.C. 68086 ff and CRC 892. Defendant San Francisco Board of Education is exempt from paying the fees. Plaintiff Alan K. Wong to remit fees. Reporter: Melanie Dawn Gheno, CSR #7489
